full_text:
Gyesu of Goguryeo 罽須
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gyesu of Goguryeo (罽須)was born in Gaoqouli/Koguryo. In 208, commanded a defence against his older brother Balgi and Gongsun Kang. The aftermath is disputed.
